title: myroxylon ovatum
intro: Myroxylon ovatum, also known as Palo Santo, is a tropical tree native to the Americas, particularly in the Andean regions of South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues such as pain, fever, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Palo Santo include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Palo Santo is traditionally prepared as an essential oil, which is often used in aromatherapy, and can also be found in herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions.
